spec: eat -> accept x2(10m) -> road>=2% -> vol>=1.5x -> rsi>55 rising + ema23 -> fresh floors below

fractal_channel_gap_context.operator_note: no higher-timeframe red-gap transfer plus floor-building pattern was proven
fractal_channel_gap_context.gill_read_template: start from daily/HTF channel; then test whether price is accepting into a large red gap with volume and 15m green gaps/floors building below. In that case red overhead can be transfer/eat, not a hard blocker.
